messages.content: A wooden picnic table with two long benches running parallel on its left and right sides.
A watchtower standing on top of a broad stone platform.
A small campfire directly in front of a wooden cabin.
A lighthouse with a rotating beacon sphere hovering above its roof.
A castle gate flanked by two defensive towers positioned a moderate distance apart.
A large boulder with a tiny bird perched on top of it.
Three streetlights lined up along a road at equal spacing.
[streetlight][0,0,0,0,0,0,1.0][streetlight][fd*@idx,0,0,0,0,0,1.0][streetlight][fd*@idx,0,0,0,0,0,1.0]
A satellite dish mounted on the right side of a communication building.
[communication building][0,0,0,0,0,0,2.0][satellite dish][fw,0,hh,0,45,0,0.5]
A decorative fountain centered in a courtyard with four flower planters symmetrically placed around it.
[fountain][0,0,0,0,0,0,1.5][flower planter][sym(2fw),0,0,0,0,0,0.5][flower planter][0,sym(2fd),0,0,0,0,0.5]
A cargo crate with a warning beacon attached to its upper left corner.
[cargo crate][0,0,0,0,0,0,1.0][warning beacon][-hw,0,fh,0,0,0,0.2]
A suspension bridge supported by two massive towers with the roadway spanning between them.
A treasure chest partially hidden behind a giant rock.
[giant rock][0,0,0,0,0,0,2.5][treasure chest][hw,-hd,hh,0,0,0,0.5]
A floating crystal hovering high above an ancient pedestal.
[ancient pedestal][0,0,0,0,0,0,1.2][floating crystal][0,0,2fh,0,0,0,0.4]
A train engine with two passenger cars directly behind it.
[train engine][0,0,0,0,90,0,1.5][passenger car][0,-fd,0,0,90,0,1.2][passenger car][0,-fd*@idx,0,0,90,0,1.2]
A giant tree with a wooden treehouse attached halfway up its trunk.
A stone altar with two torches standing on either side.
A submarine resting beneath the ocean surface with a buoy floating directly above it.
A large warehouse and a security booth positioned near its front-left corner.
[warehouse][0,0,0,0,0,0,4.0][security booth][-fw,fd,0,0,0,0,0.4]
A radar tower with four antenna dishes mounted around its upper section.
[radar tower][0,0,0,0,0,0,3.0][antenna dish][sym(fw),0,fh,0,0,0,0.3][antenna dish][0,sym(fd),fh,0,90,0,0.3]
A ceremonial stone circle with a glowing crystal suspended exactly in the middle above the stones.
